series_metadata.series_description: Contains an order form sent to ODH to order educational materials such as pamphlets, stickers, bookmarkers and posters. Includes payment and order form.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 2 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State ; Paper: Retain for 2 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
